name: Atlas Reactor
short_description: SEASON 6 NOW LIVE! The battle for Atlas continues as a hot (some might even say fiery) new freelancer enters the scene.
detailed_description:
Play 10 matches to earn a Freelancer of your choice!

With short match times and fast-paced combat, you'll have your favorite 'lancer before you know it. Log in and start earning your Freelancer now!


Recruit-a-Friend. Get bonus loot.

We’ve updated the RAF (Recruit-A-Friend) and it’s easier and more rewarding than ever! Just click on the Recruit button in game to start.

Get 5 RAF Points the first time each of your recruits play 10 PvP games, plus earn one-for-one points for any money they spend on the game!

Your recruits will receive a 7-Day Access Pass to try Atlas Reactor in its fullest, including all freelancers and ranked mode! Be sure to play some matches with them to train them so they can go on to train their own recruits.


About the Game

Competitive PvP

Compete in 4v4 team battles in Solo, Vs. Bots, PvP, Ranked, and Custom games. With the range of ability combos possible, no two matches are ever the same.

Customizable heroes

Battle as one of an ever-growing roster of Freelancers! Customize each hero’s abilities with Ability Mods, which can be saved into loadouts or tweaked to counter enemy teams.

Unique maps and environments

Fight in battles all around the city of Atlas, including the deck of a flying cargo ship, a rooftop garden, a hi-tech laboratory, and the engineering bay of a working reactor core.

Seasonal stories and rewards

Experience Atlas’ story through “Seasons,” a multi-week arc where players can influence the fate of the world and challenges reward regular gameplay with bonus loot!

A futuristic universe

Enter a cloud-piercing megacity where Freelancers fight for (and against) monolithic Trusts vying for control over the last Reactor on the planet.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
